message:
Enable hardware video decoding and optimize player for Android TV

- player_service.dart: Add Android-specific mpv properties after player
  creation (hwdec=mediacodec-copy, vo=gpu, framedrop=vo, cache/demuxer
  buffer tuning) inside _initPlayer() behind Platform.isAndroid guard.
- multi_view_screen.dart: Add _configurePlayer() helper that applies the
  same hwdec and buffering properties to each Player instance in the
  multi-view grid.
- channels_screen.dart: No changes needed — it reuses the PlayerService
  singleton which now includes the Android optimizations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
